# MOTARRO Supplies

> MOTARRO Supplies is a South African custom apparel and printing company based in Kempton Park and Johannesburg. We offer custom printed t-shirts, hoodies, corporate uniforms, event merchandise, and promotional goods. Services include sublimation printing, screen printing, DTG (direct-to-garment), and embroidery. We serve customers nationwide with free shipping on orders over R1000 and same-day printing options.

We specialize in bulk custom clothing, school event merchandise, corporate branding, and personalized gifts. Our product range includes men's and women's apparel, accessories, ready-to-ship items, and custom printing with your own designs.

## Main

- [Home](https://www.motarro.co.za/): Custom printed apparel and clothing in South Africa
- [Products](https://www.motarro.co.za/products): All products – printed apparel and custom clothing
- [Men's Collection](https://www.motarro.co.za/men): Men's custom printed clothing and t-shirts
- [Women's Collection](https://www.motarro.co.za/women): Women's custom apparel and printed clothing
- [Accessories](https://www.motarro.co.za/accessories): Custom printed accessories – hats, bags, mugs, more
- [Custom Printing](https://www.motarro.co.za/custom-printing): Custom printing services and sublimation – upload your design
- [Ready to Ship](https://www.motarro.co.za/ready-to-ship): Ready-to-ship items for fast delivery
- [Sale](https://www.motarro.co.za/sale): Sale items – discounted custom apparel
- [Pricing](https://www.motarro.co.za/pricing): Pricing and calculator for custom printing
- [Branded Catalog](https://www.motarro.co.za/branded-catalog): Live branded apparel, headwear, bags, and promotional products
- [Sublimation Supplies](https://www.motarro.co.za/sublimation-supplies): Titan Jet sublimation blanks, mugs, tumblers, vinyl, and heat transfer products
